segments.text: when you allow yourself to say no you get much more comfortable with taking a no from other people and setting boundaries is not a way of pushing
people away setting boundaries is telling the other person that I love and respect our relationship so much that this is where I draw the line that this
is how much further I will go and if we go beyond this there's a chance of damaging our relationship it's almost a
way of reserving your relationship and not pushing it away
